data.name: EmailValidator
data.value: The value is not a valid email address.

data.name: GreaterThanOrEqualValidator
data.value: The value must be greater than or equal to '{ComparisonValue}'.

data.name: GreaterThanValidator
data.value: The value must be greater than '{ComparisonValue}'.

data.name: LengthValidator
data.value: The value must be between {MinLength} and {MaxLength} characters. You entered {TotalLength} characters.

data.name: MinimumLengthValidator
data.value: The length of the value must be no less than {MinLength} characters. You entered {TotalLength} characters.

data.name: MaximumLengthValidator
data.value: The length of the value must be no more than {MaxLength} characters. You entered {TotalLength} characters.

data.name: LessThanOrEqualValidator
data.value: The value must be less than or equal to '{ComparisonValue}'.

data.name: LessThanValidator
data.value: The value must be less than '{ComparisonValue}'.

data.name: NotEmptyValidator
data.value: The value must not be empty.

data.name: NotEqualValidator
data.value: The value must not be equal to '{ComparisonValue}'.

data.name: NotNullValidator
data.value: The value must not be empty.

data.name: PredicateValidator
data.value: The specified condition was not met for the value.

data.name: AsyncPredicateValidator
data.value: The specified condition was not met for the value.

data.name: RegularExpressionValidator
data.value: The value is not in the correct format.

data.name: EqualValidator
data.value: The value must be equal to '{ComparisonValue}'.

data.name: ExactLengthValidator
data.value: The value must be {MaxLength} characters in length. You entered {TotalLength} characters.

data.name: InclusiveBetweenValidator
data.value: The value must be between {From} and {To}. You entered {PropertyValue}.

data.name: ExclusiveBetweenValidator
data.value: The value must be between {From} and {To} (exclusive). You entered {PropertyValue}.

data.name: CreditCardValidator
data.value: The value is not a valid credit card number.

data.name: ScalePrecisionValidator
data.value: The value must not be more than {ExpectedPrecision} digits in total, with allowance for {ExpectedScale} decimals. {Digits} digits and {ActualScale} decimals were found.

data.name: EmptyValidator
data.value: The value must be empty.

data.name: NullValidator
data.value: The value must be empty.

data.name: EnumValidator
data.value: The value is outside the range of allowed values.

data.name: InvalidSortedFields
data.value: The value must contain only unique sorting fields from the following list: {0}
